main.description: One renderable map product published by an organization: a vector GeoJSON file or raster imagery (e.g. a drone orthomosaic) hosted at `uri`. Repeat captures of the same area join an app.gainforest.organization.layerGroup by setting `groupRef` — membership lives here on the layer, so publishing a new capture is a single appended record.

type.description: How the data at `uri` is rendered. Open set — clients ignore layers whose type they cannot render.

uri.description: URL of the layer data: a GeoJSON file for vector types, a COG GeoTIFF for raster_tif, or a {z}/{x}/{y} tile template for tms_tile

category.description: Category used to section layers in UI (e.g. 'Biodiversity', 'Land Cover')

bounds.description: Geographic footprint as 'west,south,east,north' in WGS84 decimal degrees (e.g. '126.343,8.2547,126.3574,8.2648'). A string because lexicons have no float type. Lets clients fly to the layer and detect spatial overlap.

capturedAt.description: When the underlying data was captured in the field (e.g. the drone flight date). Canonical temporal field: within a layer group, distinct capture days become the stops of a time slider, and layers sharing a capture day are treated as products of the same survey.

groupRef.description: AT-URI of the app.gainforest.organization.layerGroup this layer belongs to. Set on every repeat capture of a monitored area so clients can offer change-over-time views without geometric inference.

siteRef.description: AT-URI of the app.certified.location (project site) this layer belongs to

isDefault.description: Whether this layer should be visible by default when its organization is focused

displayOrder.description: Ordering priority within layer lists (lower sorts first)

legend.description: Legend entries rendered while the layer is visible

legendEntry.description: A single entry in a layer legend

label.description: Display label for this legend entry

value.description: Optional value associated with this legend entry
